name: Building Safety Act 2022 — Higher-Risk Buildings
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules for the Building Safety Act 2022 regime overseen by the Building Safety Regulator (BSR, HSE). Mandatory for Higher-Risk Buildings (HRBs) — buildings at least 18 metres in height OR containing at least 7 storeys, with at least 2 residential units. Covers the three Gateway approvals (Gateway 1 planning, Gateway 2 pre-construction, Gateway 3 pre-occupation), the Golden Thread of information, Principal Accountable Person registration, mandatory occurrence reporting and the Resident Engagement Strategy.
